preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Tissue' AND description = 'sampleType name'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'tissue'

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Tissue' AND description = 'sampleType name')

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Cytology' AND description = 'sampleType name'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'cytology'

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Cytology' AND description = 'sampleType name')

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Body Fluid' AND description = 'sampleType name'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'body fluid'

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Body Fluid' AND description = 'sampleType name')

changeSet.author: openelis-pathology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Pathology'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'tissue'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.department_sample_type dst JOIN clinlims.test_section ts ON dst.test_section_id = ts.id JOIN clinlims.type_of_sample tos ON dst.sample_type_id = tos.id WHERE ts.name = 'Pathology' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'tissue'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.department_sample_type (id, test_section_id, sample_type_id, is_active, sort_order, lastupdated) SELECT nextval('clinlims.department_sample_type_seq'), ts.id, tos.id, 'Y', 1, now() FROM clinlims.test_section ts, clinlims.type_of_sample tos WHERE ts.name = 'Pathology' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'tissue';

changeSet.author: openelis-pathology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Pathology'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'cytology'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.department_sample_type dst JOIN clinlims.test_section ts ON dst.test_section_id = ts.id JOIN clinlims.type_of_sample tos ON dst.sample_type_id = tos.id WHERE ts.name = 'Pathology' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'cytology'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.department_sample_type (id, test_section_id, sample_type_id, is_active, sort_order, lastupdated) SELECT nextval('clinlims.department_sample_type_seq'), ts.id, tos.id, 'Y', 2, now() FROM clinlims.test_section ts, clinlims.type_of_sample tos WHERE ts.name = 'Pathology' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'cytology';

changeSet.author: openelis-pathology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Pathology'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'body fluid'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.department_sample_type dst JOIN clinlims.test_section ts ON dst.test_section_id = ts.id JOIN clinlims.type_of_sample tos ON dst.sample_type_id = tos.id WHERE ts.name = 'Pathology' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'body fluid'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.department_sample_type (id, test_section_id, sample_type_id, is_active, sort_order, lastupdated) SELECT nextval('clinlims.department_sample_type_seq'), ts.id, tos.id, 'Y', 3, now() FROM clinlims.test_section ts, clinlims.type_of_sample tos WHERE ts.name = 'Pathology' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'body fluid';

changeSet.author: openelis-pathology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Pathology'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'blood'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.department_sample_type dst JOIN clinlims.test_section ts ON dst.test_section_id = ts.id JOIN clinlims.type_of_sample tos ON dst.sample_type_id = tos.id WHERE ts.name = 'Pathology' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'blood'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.department_sample_type (id, test_section_id, sample_type_id, is_active, sort_order, lastupdated) SELECT nextval('clinlims.department_sample_type_seq'), ts.id, tos.id, 'Y', 4, now() FROM clinlims.test_section ts, clinlims.type_of_sample tos WHERE ts.name = 'Pathology' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'blood';

changeSet.author: openelis-pathology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Pathology'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'bone marrow'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.department_sample_type dst JOIN clinlims.test_section ts ON dst.test_section_id = ts.id JOIN clinlims.type_of_sample tos ON dst.sample_type_id = tos.id WHERE ts.name = 'Pathology' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'bone marrow'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.department_sample_type (id, test_section_id, sample_type_id, is_active, sort_order, lastupdated) SELECT nextval('clinlims.department_sample_type_seq'), ts.id, tos.id, 'Y', 5, now() FROM clinlims.test_section ts, clinlims.type_of_sample tos WHERE ts.name = 'Pathology' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'bone marrow';
